title: spermacoce dasycephala
intro: Spermacoce dasycephala, also known as the Thunberg's buttonbush or Buttonbush, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as supporting the immune system. Spermacoce dasycephala can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional African folk medicine in various herbal preparations.
